summary: All 4 UI/UX bug fixes verified successfully. Bug 1: 'MRN (Medical Record Number)' label in PatientFormPage and 'MRN:' label in MeetingDetailPage patient cards. Bug 3: MRN auto-populates when selecting patient in Add Agenda dialog. Bug 4: Requested Provider is now a dropdown populated with meeting participants.
seed_data_creation: Created test patient 'Test BugPatient' with MRN 'MRN-BUG-001', created meeting 'Bug Test Meeting', added Dr. John Smith as participant
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI/UX bugs have been fixed and verified. The app is working correctly.

bug_1_part_1.description: Change 'Patient ID' label to 'MRN (Medical Record Number)' in PatientFormPage
bug_1_part_1.evidence: Label now shows 'MRN (Medical Record Number)' in the standalone patient form

bug_1_part_2.description: Change 'ID:' label to 'MRN:' in MeetingDetailPage patient cards
bug_1_part_2.evidence: Patient card in meeting detail page shows 'MRN: MRN-BUG-001' instead of 'ID:'

bug_3.description: Auto-populate MRN when selecting patient in 'Add Agenda Item' dialog
bug_3.evidence: When selecting 'Test BugPatient' from dropdown, MRN field auto-populates with 'MRN-BUG-001'

bug_4.description: Convert 'Requested Provider' from text input to dropdown showing meeting participants
bug_4.evidence: Requested Provider is now a Select dropdown showing 'Dr. John Smith - Oncology' (meeting participant)
